_README: Hand-curated as-printed 2001 daily bars for delisted/lineage-broken symbols (see symbols.py). Sources: (a) Wayback-archived Yahoo table.csv captures whose crawl date PRECEDES the ticker's lineage break — their unadjusted Close column matched archived 2001 CNNfn Dow-30/sector tables to the penny wherever both exist; (b) github.com/sahilnale/hft-simulator unadjusted daily histories, admitted per-symbol only after its 2001-09-10/17/18 closes matched independently-established CNN values exactly; (c) contemporaneous CNN/CNNfn articles via Wayback for symbols with no surviving machine-readable series. Where a source gives only closes, the bar's high/low are the min/max span of the day's known endpoints and the open is left for the generator's prior-close fill (flat open=close on the 9/17 gap day) — conservative bounds, never invented ranges. Beware: post-lineage-break captures serve the WRONG COMPANY (a 2014 capture of ?s=t returns SBC, today's Stooq AMR.US is Alpha Metallurgical Resources).

AMR.citation: Wayback ichart.finance.yahoo.com table.csv?s=AMR captured 2011-12-29 (AMR Corp still listed), full unadjusted OHLC; closes corroborated by CNN 2001-09-17 sectorstox + 2001-09-18 airlines_bailout articles (web.archive.org/web/20111229215457, /web/20011116095042, /web/20011116101603)

UAL.citation: Wayback table.finance.yahoo.com weekly CSV captured 2002-01-24 (week-of-9/4 close = 9/7 close; week-of-9/10 is a single-session week = exact 9/10 OHLC; 9/17 open) + CNN 2001-09-17/18 closes (web.archive.org/web/20020124115920, /web/20011116095042, /web/20011130024400); 9/7 and 9/17-18 high/low are conservative endpoint spans

DAL.citation: Wayback chart.yahoo.com table.csv?s=dal captured 2001-10-04 (contemporaneous, 6 years before the 2007 post-bankruptcy DAL relisting), full unadjusted OHLC; closes match CNN 2001-09-17 sectorstox (-16.61 to 20.64) and 2001-09-18 NY wrap (+2.29 to 22.93) exactly (web.archive.org/web/20011004100534, /web/20011116095042, /web/20011215210505)

CAL.citation: github.com/sahilnale/hft-simulator data/history/CAL.csv (unadjusted; 9/10=39.64, 9/17=20.05, 9/18=17.72 all match CNN-established closes exactly, authenticating the series and its 9/7 row + OHLC) cross-checked vs CNN sectorstox/airlines_bailout (web.archive.org/web/20011116095042, /web/20011116101603)

NWAC.citation: Wayback chart.yahoo.com Historical Quotes page for Nasdaq:NWAC captured 2001-11-24 (contemporaneous, years before delisting), full unadjusted OHLC; closes match CNN 2001-09-17 sectorstox (-7.20 to 12.42) and the 9/19 airline_layoffs derivation (12.91) exactly, and its 9/6 close 20.15 matches CNN's midday-9/7 prior close (web.archive.org/web/20011124175335, /web/20011116095042, /web/20011116093518)

U.citation: Wayback chart.yahoo.com table.csv?s=u captured 2001-11-01 (contemporaneous, years before ticker reuse), full unadjusted OHLC; closes match CNN 2001-09-17 sectorstox/NY wrap (-6.05 to 5.57) and the 9/19 derivation (5.81) exactly (web.archive.org/web/20011101101516, /web/20011116095042, /web/20011109114019)

EK.citation: Wayback chart.yahoo.com table.csv?s=ek captured 2003-09-19 (EK still listed), full unadjusted OHLC; matches archived CNNfn Dow-30 table 9/18 close 39.83 and CNN 9/19 Kodak article to the penny (web.archive.org/web/20030919145038, /web/20010919060626)

GM.citation: Wayback ichart.finance.yahoo.com table.csv?s=GM captured 2009-01-01 (old GM, data 1962-2008), full unadjusted OHLC; confirmed by CNN 9/7 wrap ('down $1.87 to $51.40'), CNN 9/17 GM article, archived CNNfn Dow-30 table (web.archive.org/web/20090101004301, /web/20011105213758, /web/20010919060626)

T.citation: Old AT&T Corp (pre-Nov-2002 reverse split; NOT the SBC lineage that wears T today — a 2014 Wayback capture of ?s=t serves SBC prices and was rejected). CNN 9/10 NY wrap ('T: down $0.05 to $17.65' → 9/7=17.70), archived CNNfn Dow-30 + widely-held tables 9/18 18.30 (+0.78 → 9/17=17.52) (web.archive.org/web/20020314193051, /web/20010919060626, /web/20010919060711); high/low are conservative endpoint spans

MMC.citation: Wayback ichart.finance.yahoo.com table.csv?s=mmc captured 2014 (MMC lineage continuous, Close column as-printed pre-2002-split ~$87 vs adj ~$30), full unadjusted OHLC; independently reproduced row-for-row by github.com/sahilnale/hft-simulator MMC.csv (web.archive.org/web/20140618060200)

MER.citation: github.com/sahilnale/hft-simulator data/history/MER.csv (unadjusted, no splits after Aug 2000; 9/10=46.85 and 9/17=41.48/-11.5% match the Bloomberg-derived figures in the 9/11 insider-trading literature; dataset reproduces CNNfn printed closes exactly for AIG/C), full OHLC

LEH.citation: Wayback ichart.finance.yahoo.com table.csv?s=LEH captured 2005-11-22 (BEFORE Lehman's Apr-2006 2-for-1 split, so Close is as-printed 2001 dollars) agreeing exactly with github.com/sahilnale/hft-simulator LEH.csv, full OHLC (web.archive.org/web/20051122001749)

BSC.citation: Wayback itable.finance.yahoo.com table.csv?s=bsc captured 2006-06-02 (Bear Stearns alive, no 2001-2006 splits) agreeing exactly with github.com/sahilnale/hft-simulator BSC.csv, full OHLC (web.archive.org/web/20060602011707)

RTN.citation: github.com/sahilnale/hft-simulator data/history/RTN.csv (unadjusted Raytheon Company series, pre-RTX; 9/10=24.85, 9/17=31.50/+26.8%, 9/18=31.56 all match CNN sectorstox + archived CNNfn Aerospace snapshot exactly, authenticating the 9/7 row + OHLC) (web.archive.org/web/20011116095042, /web/20010920091257)

HLT.citation: github.com/sahilnale/hft-simulator data/history/HLT.csv (unadjusted pre-2007-buyout Hilton Hotels Corp series, NOT today's 2013 re-listing; 9/10=11.19, 9/17=8.55, 9/18=7.85 all match CNN sectorstox/hotstox/hilton articles exactly, authenticating the 9/7 row + OHLC) (web.archive.org/web/20011116095042)
